rationale: Israel's renewed strikes on Lebanon and Iran's claim of a near-deal with the US are the most relevant developments for Poland — energy price implications and regional spillover risk, but no qualitative change in the Russia-Ukraine war or EU security posture.

top_events.title: Israel strikes Lebanon; Iran claims US deal near
top_events.summary: Continued Israeli strikes on Lebanon alongside Iran's claim of an imminent deal with the US keeps energy market uncertainty alive for Poland. No signed deal yet means gas/oil prices remain volatile.

top_events.title: US orders Anthropic to disable AI for foreign nationals
top_events.summary: US restricting AI tools for non-Americans could indirectly affect Polish businesses and researchers relying on US AI services, signaling tightening tech access barriers.

top_events.title: Switzerland votes on population cap at 10 million
top_events.summary: A Swiss referendum on capping population could signal broader European sentiment shifts on migration, with indirect relevance to EU migration policy debates affecting Poland.
